name: Crock Pot Chili
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the ground beef and drain any excess fat.
2. Place the browned beef in the crockpot.
3. Add chopped celery, mushroom, onion, bay leaf, chili powder, garlic powder, salt, paprika, BBQ sauce, tomato sauce, stewed tomatoes, and red cayenne pepper to the crockpot.
4. Cook on low for 8-10 hours or on high for 5-6 hours, stirring occasionally.
5. About 1 1/2 hours before serving, add the kidney beans to the crockpot.
